title: Scaling-Aware Adapter for Structure-Grounded LLM Reasoning

contributions.name: Scaling-Aware Patching
contributions.description: Uses instruction-conditioned gating to select anchors and expand variable-size structural patches, letting the query token budget grow with structural complexity

contributions.name: Geometry Grounding Adapter
contributions.description: Refines adaptive tokens through cross-attention with modality embeddings, injecting final modality tokens into the LLM to provide explicit geometric grounding

challenges.name: Budget Scaling in All-Atom Modalities
challenges.description: All-atom graphs span a wide size range, requiring adaptive allocation of representational capacity

challenges.name: Structural Hallucination
challenges.description: Sequence-only inputs do not encode geometry or long-range spatial relations, leading to geometric rationales not entailed by the conditioning context

dataset.name: GEO-AT
dataset.description: Used for functional group hallucination test

key_findings: Q-Former-style fixed-length query connectors yield lower performance for molecules in larger length bins due to over-compressed geometric features
Increasing the budget over-allocates capacity to small entities, diluting attention
LLMs that lack verifiable structural evidence can produce geometric rationales not entailed by the conditioning context
